pytest failed: 16 issues found
Summary: 16 test failures in tests/packages/erk_shared/test_impl_context.py
All failures are the same type: `TypeError: function got an unexpected keyword argument 'pr_id'`
Failed tests: - `tests/packages/erk_shared/test_impl_context.py::test_create_impl_context_success` - create_impl_context() got unexpected 'pr_id' argument - `tests/packages/erk_shared/test_impl_context.py::test_create_impl_context_already_exists` - build_impl_context_files() got unexpected 'pr_id' argument
The issue is that the test file is calling `create_impl_context()` and `build_impl_context_files()` with a `pr_id` parameter, but the functions no longer accept this parameter. This appears to be related to the branch name "plnd/O9109-rename-planbackend-m-03-10-2345" which suggests a semantic rename of plan-related parameters (likely renaming from `plan_id` to `pr_id` or vice versa).
